title: Receptor
description: Base ascription schema for Receptor Ascriptions. A Receptor is an input port of a Mechanism, derived by the definition-manager from the Mechanism rule's AST (e.g., on("Archetype") triggers and response expectations). It references the owning Mechanism and the Archetype that types the received data. Tenant-defined archetypes MUST NOT extend Receptor.

mechanism.description: ID reference to the owning Mechanism.

archetype.description: ID reference to the Archetype that types the Receptor's input payload.

interface.description: Optional ID reference to the Interface that exposes this Receptor for inter-Structure coupling. Null means the port is private to the Structure.
